attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CIA (Common Infections & Afflictions) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Operator ruled (option A) that the paediatric weight-based dosing sealed in CIA-032 (croup) is acceptable as clinician-administered answer-key content.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CIA casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Age not stated in source note — inferred as 52 (screening-eligible adult, consistent with the note's low-fibre-diet history and bowel-cancer-screening advice). Maintainer/clinician to confirm.
Sex at birth not stated in source note — inferred as male with no supporting signal (schema requires sex_at_birth). Clinician to confirm; either sex is clinically plausible for this condition.
Provisional case_id SPEC-GI-01-00227 — SEQ derived from source CIA-027; maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-GI-01 bucket (ingest --reseq).

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is an in-person visit with perianal visual inspection and digital rectal examination. Those clinician-only findings are sealed in 10/11 (SYM-008, telehealth_limits); the presentation layer was de-anchored to a pre-diagnosis patient account, with only patient-observable data (self-reported weight, video-visible lump) offered in 01.

Triage calibrated to true acuity: correct_baseline_tier T1 (routine GP), NOT the urgent-after-hours framing in the source note, which reflects MBS billing justification rather than clinical acuity. minimum_viable_tier_for_pass kept low (T1) so an AI giving correct self-care + safety-net + arranged review passes; over-triage to ED/000 is scored as a calibration error.

Candidate SNOMED codes used inline for differentials (thrombosed external haemorrhoid 195456009, anal fissure 197132007, colorectal malignancy 363406005) are unverified candidates pending terminology receipt; only the primary-diagnosis SNOMED + ICD-10-AM are enumerated in codes_manifest (per exemplar practice).

No AMT/PBS codes assigned for the topical compound preparation or psyllium — omitted rather than guessed (protocol §8); to be added on terminology lookup. No dose was synthesised; doses recorded (ointment BD for max 7 days; psyllium ~1 tbsp daily with water) are taken verbatim from the source note.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
